zh.lifeSummary: 當Julianne Derebaugh於1527年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Thomas Derehaugh12歲，母親Alice Godbold25歲。她於1549年與Tobias John Chapman在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1571年2月28日在她的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julianne Derebaugh于1527年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Thomas Derehaugh12岁，母亲Alice Godbold25岁。她于1549年与Tobias John Chapman在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1571年2月28日在她的家乡享年44岁。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Julianne Derebaugh was born in 1527, in Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas Derehaugh, was 12 and her mother, Alice Godbold, was 25. She married Tobias John Chapman in 1549, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 28 February 1571, in her hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julianne Derebaugh est née en 1527, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Derehaugh, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Alice Godbold, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Tobias John Chapman en 1549, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julianne Derebaugh è nata il nel 1527 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Thomas Derehaugh, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Alice Godbold, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Tobias John Chapman nel 1549, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 febbraio 1571, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Julianne Derebaugh(이)가 1527년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Derehaugh(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Godbold(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1549년 영국 랭카실르에서 Tobias John Chapman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 2월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julianne Derebaugh nasceu em 1527, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Derehaugh, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Alice Godbold, tinha 25 anos. ru.Oxford, Suffolk, England: оксфорд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julianne Derebaugh родилась в 1527 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Derehaugh было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Godbold, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tobias John Chapman в 1549 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 28 февраля 1571 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
